Vineyard Academy · 雅思写作
写作介绍 评分标准 小作文 Task 1 大作文 Task 2 小作文 S1 练习
2026 新雅思写作 · 第一课 S1

从评分标准到动笔实战
系统拆解雅思写作

本课带你认识雅思写作的两大任务、四项评分维度，并通过真题图表，一步步练习小作文的开头段与概述段写作。

📊 Task 1 图表写作 ✍️ Task 2 议论文 🎯 四项评分标准 📝 边学边练
01
雅思写作介绍
两大任务，目标各不相同
Task 1 · 小作文 20 分钟 · >150 words
  • Academic：描述图表、流程或地图。
  • General：写信件（投诉、申请、感谢等）。
Task 2 · 大作文 40 分钟 · >250 words
  • 就社会话题写议论文。
  • 表达观点、分析原因或提出解决方案。
02
评分标准
四项维度 · 点击 Band 切换查看 ｜ 官方：雅思写作评分标准 - 雅思考试中文官方网站

TA / TR · 任务完成 Task Achievement / Response

小作文 Task 1 — Task Achievement（A 类）

Addresses task partially, vague/missing overview, some inaccurate details.
  • 完成部分任务
  • 没有概括段
  • 数据/特征与原图不一致
Covers main points, basic overview, mostly accurate but uneven details.
  • 有数据特征；有概括段
  • 细节不足；特征不全
Fully addresses task, clear supported overview, accurate with minor errors.
  • 特征完整
  • 有清晰的概括段
  • 信息较全，但有遗漏信息
Comprehensive, insightful overview, precise details, very good overall.
  • 概括段全面且有洞察力
  • 有精确的细节和数据支持
Flawless execution, masterful overview, elegant and accurate details.
  • 语言无差错
  • 概括段精湛完整
  • 细节优雅准确

如何解锁高分成就【Achievement】

格式正确 Appropriate Format：学术论文格式、分段写作、满足 150 words、不需要 subheadings / bullet points。

  • 成就 1 "identify key features" = 识别数据特征（趋势 / 步骤 / 变化）
  • 成就 2 "Relevant figures or data" = 给特征匹配支持数据
  • 成就 3 "A clear overview" = 概述段（总趋势 / 总变化 / 主要步骤·阶段）

TA 示范例题 ① — 地图题（Newtown Theatre）

Task The plans show Newtown Theatre in 2000 and Newtown Theatre now. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Overview 写法对比（同一张图的不同概述）：

  • Overall, Newtown theatre is bigger than it was in 2000. It has more facilities.
  • Overall, they are different.
  • The theatre is now bigger than it was in 2000. There was reconfiguration of the facilities to achieve this and a new restaurant was added that didn't exist in the past.
  • The two plans show how Newtown Theatre was in the year 2000 and how it is now.
Band 8 for Task Achievement

The two plans show how Newtown Theatre was in the year 2000 and how it is now. The theatre is now bigger than it was in 2000. There was reconfiguration of the facilities to achieve this and a new restaurant was added that didn't exist in the past.

The theatre was overall smaller in 2000. The stage was smaller and there were only 400 seats for audience members to enjoy a show. There was a park right next door, on the eastern side of the theatre and no restaurant.

The new plan shows that a large extension was added to the existing theatre on the eastern side of the building, in the space that was previously occupied by a park. In order to add 100 more seats, the entrance and facilities were moved from the Main Road side of the theatre to the eastern side of the building.

Looking inside the theatre, we can see that the stage is now bigger than it was. This was achieved by making the backstage area smaller. In addition, there are now two entrances on this eastern side and no longer any entrances on the Main Road side of the building.

The new entrances lead into a larger Foyer, with the ticket, refreshment and coat counters on the opposite wall. To the right there are new, larger toilets and next to those there is now a restaurant that didn't exist before.

Band 6 for Task Achievement

The plans show Newtown Theatre in 2000 and now. We can see that there are some changes.

In 2000, there were 400 seats but now there are 500 seats. There was one entrance, it used to be at Main Road. Now there are two entrances and they are on the right, where the park was in 2000. The Foyer, toilets, coats, tickets and refreshments are on the right now. In 2000, they were at the bottom. Also, in 2000, there was a small stage but now the stage is bigger.

Moreover, now there is a restaurant. It's on the east side. But there wasn't a restaurant before. Before there was a park next to the theatre. In the park there were trees but now the park is gone because the theatre is bigger. Now there are no trees.

Overall, Newtown theatre is bigger than it was in 2000. It has more facilities and more seats.

TA 示范例题 ② — 饼图（静态数据题）

TA = 6 分的小作文只需做到
  • 信息盘点：准确报告图表基本信息（类型、标题）、数据点准确
  • 特征准确：有一到两个最显著的特征（俄罗斯最大 26%、博茨瓦纳第二 25%）
  • 结构基本完整：开头介绍图表 · 主体陈述数据 · 结尾简单总结
TA = 8 分+ 的小作文需要做到
  • 信息盘点：准确报告基本信息、数据点准确
  • 深刻洞察：分析核心格局（俄、博双巨头主导 - 51%）；高度集中性（前三名 65%，前五名 82%）；点明非洲重要性（博、安、南非合占 42%）
  • 数据有效整合：数据自然融合到特征描述中，避免生硬罗列
  • 精准表述：术语（产值 vs 产量）、数据、区域划分、总和描述都需准确
  • 结构清晰：开头 · 概述段（核心结论）· 主体（详细描述+分析）· 结尾

大作文 Task 2 — Task Response

立场与展开
  • The main parts of the prompt are incompletely addressed. The format may be inappropriate in places.
  • The writer expresses a position, but the development is not always clear.
  • Some main ideas are put forward, but they are limited and are not sufficiently developed and/or there may be irrelevant detail.
  • There may be some repetition.
立场直接相关
  • The main parts of the prompt are addressed (though some may be more fully covered than others). An appropriate format is used.
  • A position is presented that is directly relevant to the prompt, although the conclusions drawn may be unclear, unjustified or repetitive.
  • Main ideas are relevant, but some may be insufficiently developed or may lack clarity.
立场明确，论证清晰
  • "Clear position, ideas lead to logical conclusion"（立场明确，论证清晰）
立场清晰完整
  • A clear and fully developed position is presented which directly answers the question/s.
  • Ideas are relevant, fully extended and well supported.

立场分数线：6 分「Position directly relevant」（有回答立场）→ 7 分「Clear position, ideas lead to logical conclusion」（立场明确，论证清晰）→ 9 分（立场清晰完整；观点相关性强，论证充分展开且有扎实支撑）。

充分延展 + 论证：增加细节支撑 · 有案例支撑 · 有分析对立面（题目中有对立面关键词）。

CC · 连贯与衔接 Coherence & Cohesion

Coherence「big picture」连贯性

强调逻辑性、结构合理性 → 粘合的意义。观点如何"有意义地串联"，形成清晰的整体目标或叙事。

  • 思路合理通顺
  • overall plan that makes sense
  • clear & logical flow from beginning to end
Cohesion「small scale connection」衔接性

强调物理/抽象的"绑定力" → 粘合的手段。各部分如何被"粘在一起"，维持稳定性或统一性。

  • 小单元的衔接
  • 段间关系 & 段内关系处理得当
  • 避免让人"浑身难受"的语句衔接

Coherence 官方描述

  • The logical organisation of information and ideas, or the logical progression of an argument.
  • The use of paragraphs for topic organisation and presentation.
  • The ordering of ideas and information within paragraphs.

Band 6：Clear overall progression. ｜ Band 7：Information and ideas logically organised; clear progression throughout response.

Paragraphs by Task

  • Writing Task 1：Paragraphs only important for Bands 8 and 9.
  • Writing Task 2：Paragraphs are expected at Band 6 and higher.

Cohesion · Cohesive devices include

  • Sequencers and other adverbials（e.g. First, Secondly, Moreover, In addition, In conclusion）
  • Linking devices that signal a relationship between ideas（e.g. And, Because, But, Since, So that, Even though, Although）
  • Reference and substitution devices that help avoid repetition（e.g. Pronouns, Relative Pronouns, the definite article 'the'）
✓
逻辑顺序
organising information in a logical order
✓
恰当分段
paragraphs for topic organisation
✓
段内顺序
logical sequencing within paragraphs
✓
指代灵活
flexible use of reference & substitution
✓
连接得当
linking devices marking relationships

LR · 词汇丰富度 Lexical Resource

  • 丰富的任务词汇：小作文 — 静态图·对比类词汇 / 动态图·趋势类词汇；大作文 — 论述类语言词汇
  • 丰富且恰当的话题词汇：小作文也有话题相关词汇（如城市建设/资源分布）；题干关键词的同义替换/延展相关词汇；固定搭配使用正确（learn knowledge → gain/acquire knowledge；strong engine → powerful engine）
  • 错误特征：拼写错误/搭配错误 Errors / misspelling；不合语境 Inappropriacies

LR 各分数段核心特征对比

评分维度5 分特征6 分特征7 分特征
词汇量范围≈3000-4500≈5000-6000≈8000+
话题覆盖能力仅限日常话题（家庭、天气）基础学术话题（教育、环保、效率）专业学术话题（经济、心理）
词汇多样性高度重复基础词；极少同义替换尝试同义替换但不准；依赖常见短语灵活使用同义词链；偶用习语
词汇准确性频繁词性错误 develop/development；严重搭配错误 make a research用 "thing" 指代具体概念；搭配部分错误 sustainable crime精准使用术语 carbon footprint；偶有语境失误（滥用 "myriad" 代替 "many"）
非常用词表现几乎不使用尝试使用但 30% 出错熟练使用但 10% 语境不适
错误容忍度错误严重阻碍理解错误存在但核心可懂错误极少且不影响交流
官方评语关键词"Basic and repetitive""Less common items with inappropriacies""Skilful with occasional inaccuracies"

儿童广告影响类议论文 · 分级词汇表

级别核心搭配 Collocations应用场景与逻辑功能
5 分see advertisements / like toys / eat fast food / want things描述儿童行为反应
6 分target children directly / have a bad effect / ask parents repeatedly / cause family arguments说明负面影响机制
7 分promote unhealthy consumerism / strain household budgets / create impulsive desires / exploit children's innocence分析深层社会问题
8 分employ persuasive tactics / undermine parental authority / distort nutritional perceptions / perpetuate materialistic values批判制度性弊端
✓
词汇范围
variety of words to avoid repetition
✓
恰当得体
topic-specific words, appropriate style
✓
用词精准
right word for context
✓
少见词汇
less common items, collocations, idioms
✓
拼写形态
spelling & word formation errors

GRA · 语法多样性及准确性 Grammatical Range & Accuracy

Simple and complex sentences

Simple sentences — made up of only one independent clause, that is, one subject and one verb or verb phrase.

  • In 2000, there was a small stage.
  • I took bus number 9 from Oak Street to Commercial Drive on July 11 at around 2:30pm.

Complex sentences — contain one or more additional clauses: a main (independent) clause and one or more subordinate (dependent) clauses. A dependent clause doesn't usually stand alone as a complete sentence.

  • Cities can be unhealthy because there is a lot of pollution.
  • I'll see you at my house if I'm not at the airport.

Complex structures · 复杂结构示例

  • Passive（e.g. "it has been developed"）
  • Modal（e.g. "politicians should have acted"）
  • Comparative（e.g. "these problems are far bigger"）
  • Complex noun phrase（e.g. "the physical and mental pressures of people living in the area"）

语法句式分级（动态图为例）

分数需熟练控制的语法结构典型例句考官评价关键词
5 分基本简单句（主谓宾）· 一般现在/过去时 · There be 句型 · 基础连接词（and/but/because/so）"The graph shows sales. Sales increased in 2010. Sales decreased later because of competition.""结构范围极窄"、"错误频发影响理解"
6 分复合句（含宾语/状语从句）· 被动语态（基本应用）· 比较级/最高级（常规形式）· 情态动词（can/should/may）"Although sales rose in 2010, they had declined by 2015 when the market was saturated.""尝试复杂句但错误明显"、"衔接生硬"
7 分条件句（真实/虚拟）· 定语从句（非限定性）· 分词作状语（Having…）"Having peaked at 60%, the figure dropped, whereas demand in Asia…""结构多样"、"多数句子无误"
✓
句式多样
range of sentence structures
✓
语法准确
accuracy of grammar
✓
标点正确
appropriate punctuation
03
小作文 Task 1
本课重点：动态图 · 开头段与概述段写作

3.1 小作文类型 & 写作框架

小作文类型：数据图 vs 非数据图

小作文通用题目

Universal Prompt Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant. Write at least 150 words.
  • 总结信息
  • 选择主要特征
  • 对比相关特征
  • 字数 > 150 字，20 min 以内完成

小作文写作框架

段落内容
第 1 段Introduction — 改写题目
第 2 段Overall, it is clear that... Furthermore,... （一定要有对比词汇：but / while / whereas）
第 3 段具体数据 + 适当对比
第 4 段具体数据 + 适当对比

1.2 小作文：动态图

① 什么是动态图？它的特点是 ⬇️

  • 特点：展示随时间变化的数据（有时间跨度）—— 如下图
    • eg: 1 月-7 月的销量变化
    • 重点：趋势变化，而不是类别差异（上升 / 下降 / 波动 / 保持稳定）
    • 语言：多使用趋势动词 + 副词

动态图重点：趋势变化（上升/下降/波动/保持稳定），而不是类别差异；语言多使用趋势动词 + 副词。静态图重点：类别之间的占比与对比。

辨析：此图是动是静？

Academic Writing Sample Task 1 #8 The diagram below shows the average hours of unpaid work per week done by people in different categories. (Unpaid work refers to such activities as childcare in the home, housework and gardening.) Describe the information presented below, comparing results for men and women in the categories shown. Suggest reasons for what you see.
这张图属于动态图还是静态图？

概述段（Overview）

  • 抓整体趋势：上升 / 下降 / 波动 / 稳定
  • 找最大变化 & 最小变化
  • 是否存在明显对比：谁涨得最多 / 谁跌得最明显（总体趋势 + 例外情况；上升组 vs 下降组）

细节段

  • 先确定好分组：按时间顺序写（early period → middle → final stage），或按趋势分组（持续上升的 / 持续下降的 / 波动明显的）
  • 再筛选数据：不要逐年罗列数据；选择最重要的数据（开头、结尾、峰值等）
  • 多使用趋势结构，如：X increased from A to B. / X rose sharply before falling slightly. / X remained stable at around… / There was a significant rise in…
  • 注意时态：一般过去时（大多数动态图）；如果涉及未来预测 → 一般将来时

3.2 写作准备 · 词汇 & 句式

动笔前先掌握这些趋势动词、程度副词与核心句式。完整的动词变位表、程度词搭配与句式模板，收录在下方 3.5 概述段写法 的「词汇 / 句式参考」固定面板中，可边写边查。

↑
上升
Increase · Rise · Go up · Grow
↓
下降
Decline · Decrease · Drop · Fall
→
保持
Remain · Stay stable
∿
波动
Fluctuate
↺
反弹
Rebound

3.3 动态图讲解 · 真题示例（剑18 T1）

①动态折线图 · 剑桥18 Test 1 The graph below gives information about the percentage of the population in four Asian countries living in cities from 1970 to 2020, with predictions for 2030 and 2040. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

动态图主体段三步法

  • ① 确定分段：有相似性的归为一段
  • ② 筛选数据：开头结尾、极值、升降起伏写中间
  • ③ 描述内容：定点 → 趋势 → 定点 + 适当比较（相似/不同）

3.4 开头第一段改写方法

首段改写 — 以同义转换为主。

1. 图表名字精确化

中文English中文English
曲线图line graph表格图table
柱状图bar chart流程图flow chart
饼图pie chart地图map

2. 动词精确化

illustrate / show / represent / display / demonstrate ｜ compare（对比）

below 警告 The graph below gives information…

把图表名字精确化 —— 在横线处填入正确的图表名称（below 这个词要保留并注意）：

The below gives information…

The line graph gives information…

动词精确化 —— 试着把动词替换得更精确：

illustrate / show / represent ｜ display, demonstrate ｜ compare（对比）

The line graph information

3. 数值 + 其他常见元素同义转换

中文English
比例Proportion = Percentage = ratio = share (pie chart)
数据Number = quantity (可数) / amount (不可数) · Figure / data
种类Type = kind = Category
花费Spending = Expenditure = Expense
地区region = area；nation = country（可以考虑把地区名字写进去）
人均per person = per capita

运用上面的同义转换，改写这部分内容：

...about the percentage of the population in four Asian countries living in cities

4. 时间/地点补充信息（逻辑：具体 → 概括）

年份：从 X 到 Y 年 → during a period of ___ years (= in a XYZ-year period = in ___ years) · over the course of ... years · during a period from ... to · over a period of... · over a period from.. to

原句 The graph below gives information about the percentage of the population in four Asian countries living in cities from 1970 to 2020, with predictions for 2030 and 2040.

✍️ 改写这部分时间信息：

from 1970 to 2020, with predictions for 2030 and 2040
提升 CC 小技巧 如果你的正文后续提到同样的时间段，为了提高 CC，可以使用 over the period shown。
范文 开头段最终版

The line graph shows the proportion of the population living in cities in the Philippines, Thailand, Indonesia, and Malaysia over a 50-year period, as well as projections from 2030 to 2040.

✍️ 练习 ① · Household 折线图 — 改写开头段
阅读下图题目，运用上面的同义转换方法，改写出你自己的开头段。
Prompt The graph below shows the percentage of households with different kinds of technology in the U.S. from 1995 to 1999. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant. Write at least 150 words.
字数：0 words 已保存 ✓
✍️ 练习 ② · UK Telephone Calls 柱状图 — 改写开头段
同样运用同义转换方法，为下面这道柱状图题写出开头段。
Prompt The chart below shows the total number of minutes (in billions) of telephone calls in the UK, divided into three categories, from 1995–2002. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant. Write at least 150 words.
字数：0 words 已保存 ✓
掌握如何写开头第一段 - 改写

3.5 概述段写法 · 如何读取数据特征

统一套句：Overall, it is remarkable that…. Furthermore, …..

（1）核心特征

  • ① 趋势：将开头和结尾连成一条线 — 上升 vs 下降
  • ② 大小：一开始谁最大 vs 结尾谁最大

注意衔接词：but / while / whereas（以剑18 Test 1 亚洲国家折线图为例）

练手时间

📌 词汇 / 句式参考
动词变位表 — 写动态图时按时态选用。一般过去时用于大多数动态图；涉及未来预测用一般将来时。

↑ 上升 / Increase · Rise · Go up · Grow

名词形式：an increase · a rise · an upward movement · a growth

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
increaseincreasesincreasedhave increased
riserisesrosehave risen
go upgoes upwent uphave gone up
growgrowsgrewhave grown

↓ 下降 / Decline · Decrease · Go down · Drop · Fall

名词形式：a decline · a decrease · a drop · a fall · a downward movement

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
declinedeclinesdeclinedhave declined
decreasedecreasesdecreasedhave decreased
go downgoes downwent downhave gone down
dropdropsdroppedhave dropped
fallfallsfellhave fallen

→ 保持 / Remain · Stay stable

名词形式：a steady state · a stability（"a remain" 少见）

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
remainremainsremainedhave remained
stay stablestays stablestayed stablehave stayed stable

∿ 波动 / Fluctuate

名词形式：a fluctuation

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
fluctuatefluctuatesfluctuatedhave fluctuated

↺ 反弹 / Rebound

名词形式：a rebound

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
reboundreboundsreboundedhave rebounded
趋势 + 程度搭配：形容词修饰名词（a sharp rise），副词修饰动词（rose sharply）。
程度形容词 + 名词副词 + 动词
🚀 Fast 快速的quick, sharp, rapid, suddenquickly, sharply, rapidly, suddenly
🐢 Slow 持续的gradual, consistent, steady, continuousgradually, consistently, steadily, continuously
📉 Small 轻微的slight, moderateslightly, moderately
💥 Big 剧烈的significant, considerablesignificantly, considerably
写主体段时套用这些句式，主语围绕 "the number of sth" 灵活变换。

基本句式

① N + V + adv
N (the number of students / the production) + V + adv
② There be + adj + n
There be a + adj + n + in the number of …

The number of sth 系列

(1) V + adv
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree increased continuously in these 15 years.
(2) shows a … trend
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree shows an upward trend.
(3) experienced a drop / rise
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree experienced a continuous rise.

趋势 + 在什么数字上

There be + adj + n
There was a continuous growth in the number of those who obtained a master's or doctor's degree.
Sth [地点/时间] witnessed a growth
Those years saw a steady increase in the number of those with a master's or doctor's degree.
A …[趋势] can be found in
A continuous rise can be seen in the number of those with a master's or doctor's degree.

概述段统一套句

Overview
Overall, it is remarkable that…. Furthermore, …..
对比衔接词
but / while / whereas

思路引导

1. 趋势：谁在往什么方向走？
字数：0 words已保存 ✓
2. 大小：起点、终点的极值是谁？
字数：0 words已保存 ✓
✍️ 试着提取 overall 段特征！
字数：0 words 已保存 ✓
尝试写第二段 overall 总括数据
✍️ 概述段练习 ① · Household 折线图
阅读下图题目，运用上面的方法，写出这张图的概述段。
Prompt The graph below shows the percentage of households with different kinds of technology in the U.S. from 1995 to 1999. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant. Write at least 150 words.
字数：0 words 已保存 ✓
✍️ 概述段练习 ② · UK Telephone Calls 柱状图
同样运用上面的方法，为下面这道柱状图题写出概述段。
Prompt The chart below shows the total number of minutes (in billions) of telephone calls in the UK, divided into three categories, from 1995–2002. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant. Write at least 150 words.
字数：0 words 已保存 ✓
04
大作文 Task 2
模板结构 · 例题套用（儿童广告）

例题 · 儿童广告 40 mins · 250+ words

Task 2 Prompt A lot of advertisements for things like toys and fast food are aimed at children. Many people believe that these advertisements have a bad effect on children and their families. Do you agree or disagree? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

开头段 Introduction

模板 In recent years, the issue of 【话题】 has sparked widespread debate. Some people argue that 【题目观点改写】, while on the other end of the spectrum, others hold the opposite view. I completely agree / disagree with this statement.
立场句直接、明确，不用 'to some extent' 类模糊表达。
  • 引出主题(Hook)：advertisements for business growth
  • 引出主体(Topic)：fast food & entertainment targeting children
  • 回答问题(Thesis)：Such advertisements negatively impact children's mental & physical health
范文 Introduction

In recent years, the issue of advertisements targeting children has sparked widespread debate. Some people argue that these advertisements have a detrimental impact on both children and their families, while others hold the opposite view. I completely agree with this statement.

主体段 1 · Body Paragraph 1 PEER 四步

模板 To begin with, one compelling reason why 【题目中的现象】 is that 【个人观点1 对什么方面】. To be more specific, / This is because 【解释原因】（3-4 句话）. For example / For instance, 【举例说明】. Consequently / It is thus clearly shown that 【结果/影响】.
结构：Point → Explanation → Example → Result（PEER 四步）
  • 危害 1 — 儿童肥胖 Obesity in Children
  • 影响 1：快餐广告导致儿童肥胖率上升 — 儿童不健康饮食
  • 案例：快餐店送玩具策略
  • 影响 2：强制家庭成员消费 + 形成不良饮食的循环
  • 合理结论：要监管快餐广告
范文 Body Paragraph 1

To begin with, one compelling reason why fast-food advertisements aimed at children are harmful is that they contribute significantly to childhood obesity. To be more specific, these ads use appealing tactics such as free toys to lure children into demanding unhealthy food. For example, many international chains like McDonald's offer collectible toys with children's meals. This encourages unhealthy eating habits and forces families to spend money on unnecessary products, leading to a vicious cycle of poor diet and financial pressure. Consequently, stricter regulation of fast-food advertising targeting children is urgently needed.

主体段 2 · Body Paragraph 2

模板 Furthermore, another important point is that 【个人观点2】. The main reason is that 【解释原因】. For example / For instance, 【举例说明】. Therefore / Hence, 【结果/影响】.
同样用 PEER 结构；与 bp1 论点不重叠。
  • 危害 2 — 玩具广告的负面影响
  • 影响 1：负面心理影响 — 暴力内容诱发不良思想（案例：Xbox 广告）
  • 影响 2：减少户外时间
  • 影响 3：增加家庭开支压力，攀比，霸凌被孤立心态
范文 Body Paragraph 2

Furthermore, another important point is that toy advertisements—especially those featuring violent content—can harm children psychologically and increase family financial strain. The main reason is that such ads glorify aggressive behavior and create unrealistic expectations. For instance, advertisements for Xbox frequently highlight combat scenarios, which may desensitize children to violence. Additionally, these ads foster peer comparison: children without the latest toys may feel excluded. In this case, parents face considerable pressure to make expensive purchases. Therefore, this highlights the necessity of establishing advertising standards to protect children's well-being.

结尾段 Conclusion

模板 In conclusion, for the reasons discussed above, I firmly believe that 【个人观点重申】 because 【核心解释】.
不引入新观点；回扣开头立场。
  • 核心主张：立场 — 支持题干论点
  • 承认商业必要性，强调建立儿童广告标准体系
范文 Conclusion

In conclusion, for the reasons discussed above, I firmly believe that advertisements targeting children have a bad effect because they promote unhealthy eating habits and impose financial burdens while exposing children to harmful psychological influences. Regulating such advertising is therefore essential.

Task 2 · 6 分
  • 有明确立场
  • 有论点支持
  • 结构完整
Task 2 · 7 分
  • 有明确立场且完整展开
  • 主体段论点有效展开
  • 包含细节描述和举例论证
  • 结构完整：引言 · 若干主体段 · 结论
IELTS Academic Task 1 · 专项训练

Graph & Data Language
图表语言巩固练习

通过填空、拖拽、选择与句式转换，巩固动态图写作的动词时态、程度词搭配与句式结构。

📝 动词变形 🎯 词性归类 🔁 句式转换 ✅ 一键检查
S1
Stage 1 · Foundation 基础
动词变形 & 词性归类

练习 1 · Verb Conjugation Table 动词变形填空

📌 在空格中填入正确的过去时和完成时形式。Fill in the past tense and present perfect forms.

📈 上升类动词

词语 Word现在时 Present过去时 Past完成时 Have...
increaseincreases
riserises
go upgoes up
growgrows

📉 下降类动词

词语 Word现在时 Present过去时 Past完成时 Have...
declinedeclines
decreasedecreases
go downgoes down
dropdrops
fallfalls

➡️ 其他趋势

词语 Word现在时 Present过去时 Past完成时 Have...
remainremains
fluctuatefluctuates
reboundrebounds

练习 2 · Word Class Sort 词性归类

📌 将以下单词拖入「形容词」或「副词」栏。Sort the words into adjectives and adverbs.

gradual sharply considerable rapidly steep significantly steady gradually sharp steadily rapid slight slightly moderate moderately consistent consistently
形容词 Adjective
副词 Adverb
S2
Stage 2 · Application 运用
选择 · 时态 · 句式转换

练习 3 · Choose the Correct Form 选择正确词性

📌 从括号中选择正确的词填入空格。Choose the correct word from the brackets.

  1. There was a (sharp / sharply) increase in the number of electric vehicles between 2015 and 2020.
  2. The number of tourists declined (considerable / considerably) after the travel restrictions were introduced.
  3. Coal accounted for a (significant / significantly) share of total energy production.
  4. The unemployment rate fell (gradual / gradually) over the ten-year period.
  5. There has been a (steady / steadily) growth in the use of renewable energy since 2010.

练习 4 · Tense Fill-in 时态填空

📌 用括号内动词的正确时态填空。Use the correct tense of the verb in brackets.

  1. The number of smartphone users (increase) rapidly between 2010 and 2020.
  2. Since 2015, the amount of plastic waste (grow) significantly worldwide.
  3. Coal production (fall) sharply after the new energy policy was introduced in 2018.
  4. The unemployment rate (fluctuate) slightly throughout the 1990s.
  5. Over the past decade, the use of solar energy (rise) considerably in Europe.
  6. The population of the city (remain) stable for most of the century, but (rebound) sharply after 2000.

练习 5 · Sentence Transformation 句式转换

📌 将动词句式改写成名词句式，或将名词句式改写成动词句式。Rewrite using the alternative sentence pattern.

动词句式：N + V + adv　｜　名词句式：There be a(n) adj + n + in...

1. Sales increased significantly last year.

→
There was a significant increase in sales last year.

2. The number of smokers fell sharply between 2005 and 2015.

→
There was a sharp fall in the number of smokers between 2005 and 2015.

3. There was a gradual rise in the number of people using public transport.

→
The number of people using public transport rose gradually.

4. There has been a significant decline in coal consumption since 2015.

→
Coal consumption has declined significantly since 2015.

5. The figure for renewable energy grew rapidly from 2010 to 2020.

→
There was a rapid growth in the figure for renewable energy from 2010 to 2020.

6. There was a steady increase in the number of international students between 2000 and 2019.

→
The number of international students increased steadily between 2000 and 2019.

7. The unemployment rate fluctuated slightly throughout the decade.

→
There was a slight fluctuation in the unemployment rate throughout the decade.

8. There was a sharp drop in the number of daily flights during the pandemic.

→
The number of daily flights dropped sharply during the pandemic.

📌 词汇 / 句式参考

动词变位表 — 写动态图时按时态选用。一般过去时用于大多数动态图；涉及未来预测用一般将来时。

↑ 上升 / Increase · Rise · Go up · Grow

名词形式：an increase · a rise · an upward movement · a growth

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
increaseincreasesincreasedhave increased
riserisesrosehave risen
go upgoes upwent uphave gone up
growgrowsgrewhave grown

↓ 下降 / Decline · Decrease · Go down · Drop · Fall

名词形式：a decline · a decrease · a drop · a fall · a downward movement

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
declinedeclinesdeclinedhave declined
decreasedecreasesdecreasedhave decreased
go downgoes downwent downhave gone down
dropdropsdroppedhave dropped
fallfallsfellhave fallen

→ 保持 / Remain · Stay stable

名词形式：a steady state · a stability（"a remain" 少见）

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
remainremainsremainedhave remained
stay stablestays stablestayed stablehave stayed stable

∿ 波动 / Fluctuate

名词形式：a fluctuation

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
fluctuatefluctuatesfluctuatedhave fluctuated

↺ 反弹 / Rebound

名词形式：a rebound

词语现在时过去时完成时 (have…)
reboundreboundsreboundedhave rebounded
趋势 + 程度搭配：形容词修饰名词（a sharp rise），副词修饰动词（rose sharply）。
程度形容词 + 名词副词 + 动词
🚀 Fast 快速的quick, sharp, rapid, suddenquickly, sharply, rapidly, suddenly
🐢 Slow 持续的gradual, consistent, steady, continuousgradually, consistently, steadily, continuously
📉 Small 轻微的slight, moderateslightly, moderately
💥 Big 剧烈的significant, considerablesignificantly, considerably
写主体段时套用这些句式，主语围绕 "the number of sth" 灵活变换。

基本句式

① N + V + adv
N (the number of students / the production) + V + adv
② There be + adj + n
There be a + adj + n + in the number of …

The number of sth 系列

(1) V + adv
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree increased continuously in these 15 years.
(2) shows a … trend
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree shows an upward trend.
(3) experienced a drop / rise
The number of those with a master's or doctor's degree experienced a continuous rise.

趋势 + 在什么数字上

There be + adj + n
There was a continuous growth in the number of those who obtained a master's or doctor's degree.
Sth [地点/时间] witnessed a growth
Those years saw a steady increase in the number of those with a master's or doctor's degree.
A …[趋势] can be found in
A continuous rise can be seen in the number of those with a master's or doctor's degree.

概述段统一套句

Overview
Overall, it is remarkable that…. Furthermore, …..
对比衔接词
but / while / whereas
